title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: The video argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI development efficiency and team collaboration. It highlights how Language Server Protocols (LSPs), type checking, and compile-time error detection reduce friction in AI-assisted coding workflows, and recommends TypeScript over Python for team-based AI projects despite Python's dominance in the field.
